scripts.verify: echo "[1/2] $(date '+%H:%M:%S') check:syntax START" && npm run check:syntax && echo "[1/2] $(date '+%H:%M:%S') check:syntax DONE" && echo "[2/2] $(date '+%H:%M:%S') test:smoke:popup START" && npm run test:smoke:popup && echo "[2/2] $(date '+%H:%M:%S') test:smoke:popup DONE" && echo "[done] $(date '+%H:%M:%S') verify ALL DONE"
